# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted


apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-1
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-1
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-80
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.com
  ports:
    - number: 3306
      name: mysql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---
